wikidata and wikipedia tags link to a different objects, because wikidata tag points to a redirect that should be followed

wikipedia wikidata mismatch - follow wikidata redirect - for brand prefixed tags
brand:wikidata and brand:wikipedia tags link to a different objects, because brand:wikidata tag points to a redirect that should be followed
Q78166774 vs Q62073490
Martes Sport - an affected OSM element that may be improved

overpass query usable in JOSM that will load all objects where this specific error is present:
[out:xml][timeout:3600]; ( node(7636219180)['brand:wikidata'='Q78166774']['brand:wikipedia'='pl:Martes Sport']; ); (._;>;); out meta qt;//['wikipedia wikidata mismatch - follow wikidata redirect - for brand prefixed tags']

way(993336305)['brand:wikidata'='Q154950']['brand:wikipedia'='en:Royal Dutch Shell']; way(999577784)['brand:wikidata'='Q610492']['brand:wikipedia'='en:SPAR (retailer)']; ); (._;>;); out meta qt;//['wikipedia wikidata mismatch - follow wikipedia redirect - for brand prefixed tags']


wikipedia wikidata mismatch - follow wikipedia redirect - for operator prefixed tags
operator:wikidata and operator:wikipedia tags link to a different objects, because operator:wikipedia tag points to a redirect that should be followed

wikipedia wikidata mismatch - follow wikipedia redirect - for subject prefixed tags
subject:wikidata and subject:wikipedia tags link to a different objects, because subject:wikipedia tag points to a redirect that should be followed
Q481432 vs (missing) article redirects from pl:Bronisław Komorowski (ksiądz) to pl:Bronisław Komorowski (duchowny)

wikipedia wikidata mismatch - follow wikipedia redirect - for network prefixed tags
network:wikidata and network:wikipedia tags link to a different objects, because network:wikipedia tag points to a redirect that should be followed

wikipedia wikidata mismatch - follow wikipedia redirect - for taxon prefixed tags
taxon:wikidata and taxon:wikipedia tags link to a different objects, because taxon:wikipedia tag points to a redirect that should be followed

wikipedia wikidata mismatch - follow wikipedia redirect - for name prefixed tags
name:wikidata and name:wikipedia tags link to a different objects, because name:wikipedia tag points to a redirect that should be followed
